snippets.title: Common pip commands
snippets.code:
python -m pip install --upgrade pip
python -m pip install "openai==1.40.0" "tiktoken"
python -m pip show openai          # version, location, deps
python -m pip list                 # everything installed
python -m pip uninstall openai
snippets.explanation: Prefer python -m pip so the install targets the active interpreter's env.

snippets.title: A requirements.txt
snippets.code:
# core
openai==1.40.0
langchain>=0.2,<0.3
tiktoken~=0.7.0

# include dev tools
-r dev-requirements.txt
snippets.explanation: Mix exact pins and ranges; -r pulls in another file for layered requirements.

snippets.title: Install from and capture requirements
snippets.code:
pip install -r requirements.txt   # recreate the environment

pip freeze > frozen.txt           # exact versions of ALL installed pkgs
#   includes transitive deps; useful as a snapshot/lock
snippets.explanation: -r installs from a manifest; freeze records the full resolved set for reproducibility.
